title: Funimation Licenses Rebuild
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Fri Dec 19, 2008 4:20 am Looks like Funimation might be getting Rebuild. Key hint.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 19, 2008 6:16 am That looks pretty obvious.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 20, 2008 12:44 am That's the most obvious viral clue I've ever seen. New Year's Eve, eh? Interesting that they're so barely missing Christmas.

[]: Funimation has licensed Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by Shiro » Sat Dec 20, 2008 1:56 pm Scattered through Funimation's website are little postcards. They contain hints as to what they've recently licensed. One such postcard quite obviously refers to Evangelion. So yeah. Funimation most definitely has Webuild. (Among other things they supposedly picked up are Soul Eater, Gankutsuo, Edo Rocket, Vandread, and Ikki Tousen) (Yeah, I know. No direct linking. Go ahead and fix it, please)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 20, 2008 1:58 pm Dr Nick brought that up over here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=212821#212821 What I find strange about what some of the shows that people have brought up is that they're already licensed (like Vandread, although that's a Geneon title).

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Dec 21, 2008 9:55 am excuse me, but how is "Angie, Eli, and you"....in ANY way, an "obvious" reference to Evangelion? ....or is it the forced audio similarity between "Eve, Angie, Eli" and "Evangelion?"

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Sun Dec 21, 2008 10:32 am V wrote: excuse me, but how is "Angie, Eli, and you"....in ANY way, an "obvious" reference to Evangelion? ....or is it the forced audio similarity between "Eve, Angie, Eli" and "Evangelion?"

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Dec 21, 2008 3:35 pm Well, since it says New Years, we're probably gonna have til then. Though I wonder, how many of these cards are there, and are we sure only one hint would be used per card?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Dec 21, 2008 4:21 pm yeah Nick, well anyway thanks for pointing this out; at least one way or another we'll know if they've gotten it already by January 1st

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon Dec 22, 2008 12:25 am There's ten titles and only like seven clues, so I'm betting that Hetalia and Evangelion 1.0 are in this one. And also: Eve Angie Eli And Evangieeliand Evangieliand Evangelian Evangelion Can it be made ANY clearer without giving it away?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 22, 2008 1:37 am There have been at least 8 clues found.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon Dec 22, 2008 2:56 am OK, eight clues. Which means two of them will most likely have two clues in them. Unless they meant a new title every BUSINESS day, in which case there are only eight.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 22, 2008 8:02 am if they do license REBUILD (and I hope they do), I sincerely wish as a current non Blu-Ray owning consumer that Funimation won't pull a GUNBUSTER and DIEBUSTER movie trick and ONLY release a Blu-Ray version of the film. Cause that would suck. ....Until I get Blu-Ray...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Dec 23, 2008 2:17 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2008-12-23/funimation-adds-gad-guard-anime So apparently FUNIMATION just licensed a show that had been held by Geneon years ago. What if (and this is just to throw a monkey wrench in people's thinking)- what if the EVANGELION they're hinting at isn't Rebuild but..... Neon Genesis Evangelion!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 23, 2008 2:50 pm Funi is taking over a number of old Geneon titles, since they're not around anymore. There's no way ADV and Manga will give up the rights to the Evangelion TV series and EoE/Death.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Wed Dec 24, 2008 5:06 am Ornette wrote: Funi is taking over a number of old Geneon titles, since they're not around anymore. There's no way ADV and Manga will give up the rights to the Evangelion TV series and EoE/Death.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Dec 24, 2008 9:19 am It's a done deal. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2008-12-24/funimation-adds-vandread-science-fiction-anime I can't find the image but Animenewsnetwork says somewhere on the Funimation website is THIS image- http://www4.funimation.com/video/images/shows/evangelion.jpg Seems pretty set in stone.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Dec 24, 2008 1:37 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: http://www4.funimation.com/video/images/shows/evangelion.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Dec 24, 2008 2:34 pm working for me

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 24, 2008 2:39 pm slothen wrote: link is broken
